description.L1: 2 arms, 2 pieces, 2 targets. Arm gcvdxoxnwv (color 11, orientation=180/down) at (9,27) pushes piece from (9,33) to target (9,51): 6 extensions via bottom-half of panel pdzhitfvow at (21,35). Arm shbgiallgn (color 14, orientation=90/right) at (27,9) pushes piece from (30,9) to target (51,9): 7 extensions via right-half of panel bnbtbmhoct at (36,18). Click coords: (24,44) for down-extend, (45,21) for right-extend.
